attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
 NDAPH.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  '3500-01-01',
  '3500-01-01',
   NDAPH.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  CNTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
  CNTRL.PROCESS_DATE,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_PRODUCT_KEY,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_BK_SALES_REP_NUM,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NDAPH.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
  SUM(NDAPH.TRADE_IN_AMT),
  SUM(NDAPH.DV_AH_COMP_NET_PRICE_USD_AMT),
  SUM(NDAPH.DV_AH_COMP_LIST_PRICE_USD_AMT),
  SUM(NDAPH.DV_AH_COMP_COST_USD_AMT),
  SUM(NDAPH.DV_AH_EXTENDED_QTY), 
  SUM(NDAPH.DD_AH_COMP_US_STD_PRICE_AMT),
  NDAPH.DV_AH_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
  NDAPH.DV_AH_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
  NDAPH.DV_AH_REVENUE_FLG,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_RMA_FLG, 
  NDAPH.DV_AH_ACQUISITION_FLG,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_OVERLAY_FLG,
  NDAPH.DV_AH_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
  NDAPH.DV_AH_CHARGES_FLG,
  NDAPH.DV_AH_MISC_FLG,
  NDAPH.DV_AH_SERVICE_FLG,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_CORP_BKG_FLAG,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
   NDAPH.DV_AH_BKG_PCT, 
  NDAPH.DD_AH_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
  NDAPH.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,   /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/    
  NDAPH.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,             /* Added as part of true demand bkgs definition*/   
  USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
  USER,
 CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),
 NDAPH.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 NDAPH.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 NDAPH.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 NDAPH.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 NDAPH.POB_TYPE_CD, /* NRS MPOB Change */
 NDAPH.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG, /* NRS PI3 CHANGES */
NULL,
  '='
  /*  ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY18 */
,coalesce( NDAPH.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY,-999) 
,coalesce(NDAPH.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY ,-999) 
/* END Q2FY18 XAAS */
FROM
  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DRVD_ACCEPT_PENDING_HOLD NDAPH
 CROSS JOIN      
   (SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,PROCESS_DATE  FROM  $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL ) CNTRL
   GROUP BY
  NDAPH.SALES_ORDER_KEY,
  CNTRL.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
  CNTRL.PROCESS_DATE,
  NDAPH.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_PRODUCT_KEY,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_BK_SALES_REP_NUM,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
  NDAPH.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
  NDAPH.DV_AH_INTERNATIONAL_DEMO_FLG,
  NDAPH.DV_AH_REPLACEMENT_DEMO_FLG,
  NDAPH.DV_AH_REVENUE_FLG,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_RMA_FLG, 
  NDAPH.DV_AH_ACQUISITION_FLG,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_OVERLAY_FLG,
  NDAPH.DV_AH_IC_REVENUE_FLG,
  NDAPH.DV_AH_CHARGES_FLG,
  NDAPH.DV_AH_MISC_FLG,
  NDAPH.DV_AH_SERVICE_FLG,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_CORP_BKG_FLAG,
  NDAPH.DV_AH_BKG_PCT,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
  NDAPH.DD_AH_BK_SALES_CREDIT_TYPE_CD,
  NDAPH.DV_REVENUE_RECOGNITION_FLG,  
  NDAPH.DV_NET_SPREAD_FLG,
  NDAPH.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
 NDAPH.DV_PRODUCT_KEY,
 NDAPH.DV_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
 NDAPH.SK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,
 NDAPH.POB_TYPE_CD ,  /* NRS MPOB CHANGES */
 NDAPH.NRS_TRANSITION_FLG /* NRS PI3 CHANGES */
/*  ADDED AS PART OF Q2FY18 */
  ,NDAPH.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY   
,NDAPH.DV_SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY

/* END Q2FY18 XAAS */ 

/*^^^^^^^^^^^^^*/
